description: Convert the multipart polygon geometries of the 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer into singlepart polygons using gvSIG's geoprocessing tools. The input layer contains approximately 177 features, including multipart polygons like Indonesia and the Philippines. Export the resulting singlepart polygons to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/countries_singlepart.shp and ensure the new layer is added to the View.
